# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Key Vault
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the Key Vault
  tenantId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[subscription().tenantId]"
    metadata:
      description: Tenant ID for the subscription
  applicationObjectIds:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: Array of application object IDs that need access
  servicePrincipalObjectIds:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: Array of service principal object IDs that need access
  enabledForDeployment:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable Azure Virtual Machines to retrieve certificates
  enabledForDiskEncryption:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable Azure Disk Encryption to retrieve secrets
  enabledForTemplateDeployment:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable ARM to retrieve secrets during deployments
  enableSoftDelete:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable soft delete for the Key Vault
  softDeleteRetentionInDays:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 7
    metadata:
      description: Number of days to retain deleted vaults
  enableRbacAuthorization:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Use RBAC for authorization instead of access policies
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: 2023-02-01
    name: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
      sku:
        family: A
        name: standard
      enabledForDeployment: "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]"
      enabledForDiskEncryption: "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]"
      enabledForTemplateDeployment: "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]"
      enableSoftDelete: "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]"
      softDeleteRetentionInDays: "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]"
      enableRbacAuthorization: "[parameters('enableRbacAuthorization')]"
      accessPolicies: "[concat(variables('applicationAccessPolicies'), variables('servicePrincipalAccessPolicies'))]"
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Allow
        bypass: AzureServices
        ipRules: []
        virtualNetworkRules: []
variables:
  secretsPermissions:
    - get
    - list
    - set
    - delete
    - recover
    - backup
    - restore
    - purge
  keysPermissions:
    - get
    - list
    - update
    - create
    - import
    - delete
    - recover
    - backup
    - restore
    - decrypt
    - encrypt
    - unwrapKey
    - wrapKey
    - verify
    - sign
    - purge
  certificatesPermissions:
    - get
    - list
    - update
    - create
    - import
    - delete
    - recover
    - backup
    - restore
    - managecontacts
    - manageissuers
    - getissuers
    - listissuers
    - setissuers
    - deleteissuers
    - purge
  applicationAccessPolicies:
    "$schema": https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
    contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
    copy:
      - name: applicationAccessPolicies
        count: "[if(greater(length(parameters('applicationObjectIds')), 0), length(parameters('applicationObjectIds')), 1)]"
        input:
          tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
          objectId: "[if(greater(length(parameters('applicationObjectIds')), 0), parameters('applicationObjectIds')[copyIndex('applicationAccessPolicies')], '')]"
          permissions:
            secrets: "[variables('secretsPermissions')]"
            keys: "[variables('keysPermissions')]"
            certificates: "[variables('certificatesPermissions')]"
  servicePrincipalAccessPolicies:
    "$schema": https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
    contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
    copy:
      - name: servicePrincipalAccessPolicies
        count: "[if(greater(length(parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds')), 0), length(parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds')), 1)]"
        input:
          tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
          objectId: "[if(greater(length(parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds')), 0), parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds')[copyIndex('servicePrincipalAccessPolicies')], '')]"
          permissions:
            secrets: "[variables('secretsPermissions')]"
            keys: "[variables('keysPermissions')]"
            certificates: "[variables('certificatesPermissions')]"
outputs:
  keyVaultId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
  keyVaultUri:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
